'''Nippers''' were carnivorous creatures native to [[Lutrillia/Legends|Lutrillia]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which was located in the [[Yarith sector/Legends|Yarith sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. They lived underground and often attacked vehicles that were disabled in the deserts of the planet while en route between the mobile [[City/Legends|cities]] used by the native [[Lutrillian/Legends|Lutrillians]]. The combined damages from the nippers, [[chomper]]s, and other subterranean creatures caused mechanical components to be an important commodity on Lutrillia.<ref name="Gazetteer" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nippers were first mentioned in "[[Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin]]," an article written for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook|revised edition]] of the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[Wizards of the Coast]]. The article was released on [[Wizards.com]] on [[March]] [[March 25|25]], [[2004]], and was written by [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], and [[Daniel Wallace]]. The nippers were mentioned in the article's Lutrillia entry.<ref name="Gazetteer" />
